title: BCI Metrics Envelope v1
description: Normalized BCI-derived entertainment metrics window for HorrorPlace VM-Constellation. All metric bands are normalized to [0,1]; DET is normalized to [0,10].

windowId.description: Identifier for the analysis window; should match the feature envelope window when paired.

sessionId.description: Pseudonymous identifier for the recording session; must not be a dataset subject ID.

timestamp.description: Window start time in Unix seconds (may be fractional).

featureEnvelopeId.description: Optional reference to the originating feature envelope or NDJSON file identifier.

processingVersion.description: Version string for the processing pipeline that produced this metrics envelope.

calibrationProfileId.description: Optional identifier for the calibration profile active in the feature-processing stage.
Identifier for the calibration profile used for metrics normalization at this stage.

emdBand.description: Environmental Mystery Density band, normalized to [0,1].

stciBand.description: Safe-Threat Contrast Index band, normalized to [0,1].

cdlBand.description: Cognitive Dissonance Load band, normalized to [0,1].

arrBand.description: Ambiguous Resolution Ratio band, normalized to [0,1].

detEstimate.description: Dread Exposure Time estimate for this window, on canonical [0,10] scale aligned with invariants.

overload.description: Flag indicating that BCI suggests the player is overloaded for this window.

underengaged.description: Flag indicating that BCI suggests the player is under-engaged for this window.

signalQuality.description: Qualitative indicator of BCI signal quality for this window.

method.description: Method used to derive metrics from features.

smoothingAlpha.description: Optional alpha parameter when EMA or similar smoothing is used.

modelId.description: Optional identifier for the model used to compute metrics (for ML methods).

featureMappingVersion.description: Optional version string for the feature-to-metrics mapping specification.

featureMappingRules.description: Optional list of human-readable mapping rules or tags applied in this transform.
